dashboard.label: pfSense Suricata
dashboard.description: Suricata IDS visibility for alerts, signatures, and top talkers.

search.query: `pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:suricata | eval action_norm=lower(coalesce(action, vendor_action, "alert")) | stats count by action_norm | sort - count
`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:suricata | eval severity_norm=coalesce(severity, tostring(priority)) | stats count by severity_norm | sort - count
`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:suricata | eval class_norm=coalesce(classification, "unknown") | stats count by class_norm | sort - count

`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:suricata | eval action_norm=lower(coalesce(action, vendor_action, "alert")), severity_norm=coalesce(severity, tostring(priority)), class_norm=coalesce(classification, "unknown"), src_ip_norm=coalesce(src_ip, src), dest_ip_norm=coalesce(dest_ip, dest), signature_norm=coalesce(signature, message) | eval action_tok=if("$action$"="", "*", "$action$"), severity_tok=if("$severity$"="", "*", "$severity$"), class_tok=if("$classification$"="", "*", "$classification$") | search src_ip_norm="$src_ip$" dest_ip_norm="$dest_ip$" signature_norm="$signature$" | where (action_tok="*" OR action_norm=lower(action_tok)) AND (severity_tok="*" OR severity_norm=severity_tok) AND (class_tok="*" OR class_norm=class_tok) | stats count

`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:suricata | eval action_norm=lower(coalesce(action, vendor_action, "alert")), severity_norm=coalesce(severity, tostring(priority)), class_norm=coalesce(classification, "unknown"), src_ip_norm=coalesce(src_ip, src), dest_ip_norm=coalesce(dest_ip, dest), signature_norm=coalesce(signature, message) | eval action_tok=if("$action$"="", "*", "$action$"), severity_tok=if("$severity$"="", "*", "$severity$"), class_tok=if("$classification$"="", "*", "$classification$") | search src_ip_norm="$src_ip$" dest_ip_norm="$dest_ip$" signature_norm="$signature$" | where (action_tok="*" OR action_norm=lower(action_tok)) AND (severity_tok="*" OR severity_norm=severity_tok) AND (class_tok="*" OR class_norm=class_tok) | addinfo | stats count as alerts max(info_min_time) as info_min_time max(info_max_time) as info_max_time | eval duration_minutes=(info_max_time-info_min_time)/60 | eval alerts_per_min=if(duration_minutes>0, round(alerts/duration_minutes,2), 0) | fields alerts_per_min

`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:suricata | eval action_norm=lower(coalesce(action, vendor_action, "alert")), severity_norm=coalesce(severity, tostring(priority)), class_norm=coalesce(classification, "unknown"), src_ip_norm=coalesce(src_ip, src), dest_ip_norm=coalesce(dest_ip, dest), signature_norm=coalesce(signature, message) | eval action_tok=if("$action$"="", "*", "$action$"), severity_tok=if("$severity$"="", "*", "$severity$"), class_tok=if("$classification$"="", "*", "$classification$") | search src_ip_norm="$src_ip$" dest_ip_norm="$dest_ip$" signature_norm="$signature$" | where (action_tok="*" OR action_norm=lower(action_tok)) AND (severity_tok="*" OR severity_norm=severity_tok) AND (class_tok="*" OR class_norm=class_tok) | stats dc(src_ip_norm) as unique_sources

`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:suricata | eval action_norm=lower(coalesce(action, vendor_action, "alert")), severity_norm=coalesce(severity, tostring(priority)), class_norm=coalesce(classification, "unknown"), src_ip_norm=coalesce(src_ip, src), dest_ip_norm=coalesce(dest_ip, dest), signature_norm=coalesce(signature, message) | eval action_tok=if("$action$"="", "*", "$action$"), severity_tok=if("$severity$"="", "*", "$severity$"), class_tok=if("$classification$"="", "*", "$classification$") | search src_ip_norm="$src_ip$" dest_ip_norm="$dest_ip$" signature_norm="$signature$" | where (action_tok="*" OR action_norm=lower(action_tok)) AND (severity_tok="*" OR severity_norm=severity_tok) AND (class_tok="*" OR class_norm=class_tok) | timechart span=5m count by action_norm

`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:suricata | eval action_norm=lower(coalesce(action, vendor_action, "alert")), severity_norm=coalesce(severity, tostring(priority)), class_norm=coalesce(classification, "unknown"), src_ip_norm=coalesce(src_ip, src), dest_ip_norm=coalesce(dest_ip, dest), signature_norm=coalesce(signature, message) | eval action_tok=if("$action$"="", "*", "$action$"), severity_tok=if("$severity$"="", "*", "$severity$"), class_tok=if("$classification$"="", "*", "$classification$") | search src_ip_norm="$src_ip$" dest_ip_norm="$dest_ip$" signature_norm="$signature$" | where (action_tok="*" OR action_norm=lower(action_tok)) AND (severity_tok="*" OR severity_norm=severity_tok) AND (class_tok="*" OR class_norm=class_tok) | stats count by signature_norm | sort - count | head 20 | rename signature_norm as signature

`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:suricata | eval action_norm=lower(coalesce(action, vendor_action, "alert")), severity_norm=coalesce(severity, tostring(priority)), class_norm=coalesce(classification, "unknown"), src_ip_norm=coalesce(src_ip, src), dest_ip_norm=coalesce(dest_ip, dest), signature_norm=coalesce(signature, message) | eval action_tok=if("$action$"="", "*", "$action$"), severity_tok=if("$severity$"="", "*", "$severity$"), class_tok=if("$classification$"="", "*", "$classification$") | search src_ip_norm="$src_ip$" dest_ip_norm="$dest_ip$" signature_norm="$signature$" | where (action_tok="*" OR action_norm=lower(action_tok)) AND (severity_tok="*" OR severity_norm=severity_tok) AND (class_tok="*" OR class_norm=class_tok) | stats count by src_ip_norm | sort - count | head 10 | rename src_ip_norm as src_ip

`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:suricata | eval action_norm=lower(coalesce(action, vendor_action, "alert")), severity_norm=coalesce(severity, tostring(priority)), class_norm=coalesce(classification, "unknown"), src_ip_norm=coalesce(src_ip, src), dest_ip_norm=coalesce(dest_ip, dest), signature_norm=coalesce(signature, message) | eval action_tok=if("$action$"="", "*", "$action$"), severity_tok=if("$severity$"="", "*", "$severity$"), class_tok=if("$classification$"="", "*", "$classification$") | search src_ip_norm="$src_ip$" dest_ip_norm="$dest_ip$" signature_norm="$signature$" | where (action_tok="*" OR action_norm=lower(action_tok)) AND (severity_tok="*" OR severity_norm=severity_tok) AND (class_tok="*" OR class_norm=class_tok) | stats count by dest_ip_norm | sort - count | head 10 | rename dest_ip_norm as dest_ip

`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:suricata | eval action_norm=lower(coalesce(action, vendor_action, "alert")), severity_norm=coalesce(severity, tostring(priority)), class_norm=coalesce(classification, "unknown"), src_ip_norm=coalesce(src_ip, src), dest_ip_norm=coalesce(dest_ip, dest), signature_norm=coalesce(signature, message) | eval action_tok=if("$action$"="", "*", "$action$"), severity_tok=if("$severity$"="", "*", "$severity$"), class_tok=if("$classification$"="", "*", "$classification$") | search src_ip_norm="$src_ip$" dest_ip_norm="$dest_ip$" signature_norm="$signature$" | where (action_tok="*" OR action_norm=lower(action_tok)) AND (severity_tok="*" OR severity_norm=severity_tok) AND (class_tok="*" OR class_norm=class_tok) | stats count by class_norm severity_norm | sort - count | head 20 | rename class_norm as classification severity_norm as severity

panel.title: Raw Events (most recent 10, up to 100 total)

search.query: `pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:suricata | eval action_norm=lower(coalesce(action, vendor_action, "alert")), severity_norm=coalesce(severity, tostring(priority)), class_norm=coalesce(classification, "unknown"), src_ip_norm=coalesce(src_ip, src), dest_ip_norm=coalesce(dest_ip, dest), signature_norm=coalesce(signature, message), transport_norm=coalesce(transport, proto) | eval action_tok=if("$action$"="", "*", "$action$"), severity_tok=if("$severity$"="", "*", "$severity$"), class_tok=if("$classification$"="", "*", "$classification$") | search src_ip_norm="$src_ip$" dest_ip_norm="$dest_ip$" signature_norm="$signature$" | where (action_tok="*" OR action_norm=lower(action_tok)) AND (severity_tok="*" OR severity_norm=severity_tok) AND (class_tok="*" OR class_norm=class_tok) | eval src_ip=src_ip_norm, dest_ip=dest_ip_norm, signature=signature_norm, action=action_norm, severity=severity_norm, classification=class_norm, transport=transport_norm | sort - _time | head 100 | table _time action severity classification transport src_ip src_port dest_ip dest_port signature
